name: 1 800 FLOWERS COM INC
business: 1-800-FLOWERS.COM, Inc. is a leading provider of thoughtful expressions, operating an e-commerce platform with brands including 1-800-Flowers.com, Harry & David, Cheryl's Cookies, and PersonalizationMall.com. The company operates in three segments: Consumer Floral & Gifts, Gourmet Foods & Gift Baskets, and BloomNet. It sells gifts, flowers, gourmet foods, and related products directly to consumers and businesses.

exposures.sentence: The Company s e-commerce business platform features our all-star family of brands, including: 1-800-Flowers.com , 1-800-Baskets.com , Cheryl s Cookies , Harry & David , PersonalizationMall.com , Shari s Berries , FruitBouquets.com , Things Remembered , Moose Munch , The Popcorn Factory , Wolferman s Bakery , Vital Choice , Scharffen Berger , and Simply Chocolate .
The Company operates in the following three business segments: Consumer Floral & Gifts, Gourmet Foods & Gift Baskets, and BloomNet.

Net cash used in investing activities of $44.5 million was attributable to capital expenditures primarily related to the Company's technology and automation initiatives, and the acquisition of Scharffen Berger as noted above.
